info.title: TrxToExtentReport
info.description:
Copyright (C) 2026 TrxToExtentReport
-v, --verbose        Set output to verbose messages.
-o, --output         Required. Output file for the report.
-t, --trx            Path to the TRX file.
-d, --directory      Path to a directory containing multiple TRX files.
-e, --environment    Environment name.
--help               Display this help screen.
--version            Display version information.

options.name: --output
options.description: Required. Output file for the report.

options.name: --directory
options.description: Path to a directory containing multiple TRX files.
